title: eriogonum soliceps
intro: Eriogonum soliceps, also known as Sulphur Flower Buckwheat or Sulphur Buckwheat, is a shrubby perennial plant that belongs to the buckwheat family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Eriogonum soliceps are attributed to its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, making it a versatile remedy for various health issues.
